tasks.title: ChromaDB market embeddings store
tasks.description: Create src/apex/integrations/chromadb_market_store.py with ChromaMarketStore class. Methods: upsert_market(market_id, title, platform), find_semantic_match(title, platform, top_k=5). Use sentence-transformers all-MiniLM-L6-v2 for embeddings. Wrap existing ChromaDB at settings.chromadb_path.

tasks.title: Integrate semantic scoring into ArbEngine.scan()
tasks.description: Update src/apex/services/arb_engine.py. After fuzzy match, run ChromaMarketStore.find_semantic_match(). Combined score: 0.6 * semantic + 0.4 * fuzzy. Only proceed if combined_score >= 0.72. Upsert every fetched market into ChromaDB.

tasks.title: Add resolution_ts comparison to SettlementAuditor
tasks.description: Update src/apex/services/settlement_auditor.py. Fetch resolution_ts from both Kalshi and Polymarket market data. If abs(kalshi_resolution_ts - poly_resolution_ts) > 4 hours, add flag RESOLUTION_TIME_MISMATCH to SettlementVerdict.flags and reduce match_score by 0.2.

tasks.title: M07 L2 orderbook liquidity check
tasks.description: Add M07_LIQUIDITY_DEPTH to src/apex/layers/l3/risk_checks.py. Fetch full L2 orderbook for both legs. Simulate walking the book for stake_usd. If estimated slippage > 0.005, block trade. M07 runs after M06. Log slippage estimate at DEBUG. Never crash if orderbook fetch fails — log WARNING and block conservatively.

tasks.title: M08 bid-ask spread width gate
tasks.description: Add M08_SPREAD_WIDTH to src/apex/layers/l3/risk_checks.py. If Kalshi yes bid-ask spread > 0.15, block trade. Runs after M07. Log spread width at DEBUG on every check.

tasks.title: Kelly criterion position sizing
tasks.description: Update src/apex/layers/l3/execution.py. Replace fixed stake_usd with Kelly: fraction = (net_edge * confidence) / (1 - net_edge). Cap at 5% of POLYMARKET_PAPER_BANKROLL_USD. Floor at $10. Map ArbThesis.confidence HIGH->0.8, MEDIUM->0.5, LOW->0.2. Default 0.5 if thesis is None. Log Kelly fraction and final stake at INFO.

tasks.title: Leg imbalance reconciliation
tasks.description: Update src/apex/layers/l3/execution.py. If Polymarket leg fills but Kalshi leg fails within 30 seconds, auto-market-sell the filled Polymarket leg to flatten exposure. Log CRITICAL on imbalance. Write imbalance event to SQLite audit_events table.

tasks.title: Refactor ArbAnalystPanel to asyncio.gather
tasks.description: Update src/apex/layers/l2/arb_analyst_panel.py. Run SettlementAuditor, PlatformDemographer, EdgeCalculator concurrently via asyncio.gather(). Only after all three complete pass combined outputs to Adversarial/Synthesizer agent. Update ThesisService.generate() to be fully async. Update /api/arb/{id}/thesis SSE endpoint in backend/main.py accordingly.

tasks.title: Store and inject failed thesis examples
tasks.description: Add get_failed_thesis_examples(limit=5) to src/apex/repositories/sqlite_store.py — fetches arb_opportunities where outcome=LOSS and thesis_settlement_verdict=SAFE. In arb_analyst_panel.py before building settlement prompt, call get_failed_thesis_examples() and inject as few-shot cautionary examples in SYSTEM_PROMPT. If no examples yet, proceed without injection.

tasks.title: Annualized ROC and slippage in BacktestEngine
tasks.description: Update src/apex/services/backtest_engine.py and BacktestResult dataclass. Add: annualized_roc = (avg_edge / avg_hold_days) * 365 where avg_hold_days = mean(resolution_ts - detection_ts) in days. Add slippage_adjusted_sharpe recomputing Sharpe after 0.01 penalty per leg. Add avg_hold_days: float to BacktestResult. Update /api/arb/backtest to return new fields.

tasks.title: Category analytics in backtest dashboard
tasks.description: Update src/apex/services/backtest_engine.py to compute per_category_stats: list of {category, n_trades, win_rate, avg_edge, total_pnl}. Derive category from kalshi_ticker prefix. Update BacktestResult. Update /api/arb/backtest. Add PieChart (Recharts) showing PnL by category and BarChart showing win rate by category to autopilot-local/frontend/app/dashboard/analytics/page.tsx.
tasks.test_strategy: python -m pytest tests/test_backtest_engine.py -v && cd autopilot-local/frontend && npx playwright test e2e/analytics.spec.ts

tasks.title: WebSocket endpoint for live arb opportunities
tasks.description: Add WebSocket endpoint /ws/arb-opportunities to autopilot-local/backend/main.py. On connect send current opportunities as JSON. Broadcast to all connected clients when ArbEngine.scan() finds new opportunities. Keep global set of active connections, handle disconnects cleanly.

tasks.title: Replace polling with WebSocket in arb-radar page
tasks.description: Update autopilot-local/frontend/app/dashboard/arb-radar/page.tsx. Replace polling fetch with useEffect WebSocket to ws://localhost:8000/ws/arb-opportunities. Show green dot when connected, red when disconnected. Auto-reconnect with 3s backoff. Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.
tasks.test_strategy: cd autopilot-local/frontend && npx playwright test e2e/arb-radar.spec.ts

tasks.title: Thesis chat backend endpoint
tasks.description: Add POST /api/arb/{id}/thesis/chat to autopilot-local/backend/main.py. Accepts {message: str, history: list[dict]}. Builds context from ArbOpportunity + ArbThesis + conversation history. Streams response via settings.get_llm_client(). Returns placeholder JSON if LLM unavailable.

tasks.title: Interactive chat UI in ThesisCard
tasks.description: Update autopilot-local/frontend/components/ThesisCard.tsx. After thesis streams in add follow-up chat section with input box and Send button. POST to /api/arb/{id}/thesis/chat with {message, history}. Stream response via SSE. Maintain conversation history in React state. No form elements — onClick only. Add data-testid to all elements.
tasks.test_strategy: cd autopilot-local/frontend && npx playwright test e2e/arb-radar.spec.ts

tasks.title: API circuit breakers in ArbEngine
tasks.description: Update src/apex/services/arb_engine.py. Track consecutive 429/500 errors per platform in instance variables. If errors >= 3 consecutive raise BrokerCircuitOpenError(platform) and skip that platform for current scan. Log CRITICAL on circuit open, INFO on reset. Create BrokerCircuitOpenError in src/apex/domain/exceptions.py.

tasks.title: Frontend connectivity audit and fix
tasks.description: Read every file in autopilot-local/frontend/app/ and autopilot-local/frontend/components/. For each page check: does it fetch from a real endpoint in backend/main.py? Does it handle loading/error/empty states? Are there hardcoded mock values? Run npx tsc --noEmit and fix ALL TypeScript errors. Produce docs/FRONTEND_AUDIT.md with findings table. Fix every disconnected component.
tasks.test_strategy: cd autopilot-local/frontend && npx tsc --noEmit && npx playwright test

tasks.title: Playwright E2E test suite
tasks.description: Install Playwright: cd autopilot-local/frontend && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium. Create playwright.config.ts with baseURL localhost:3000, webServer config, testDir ./e2e, timeout 30000, retries 2. Write e2e/arb-radar.spec.ts, e2e/analytics.spec.ts, e2e/navigation.spec.ts, e2e/api-smoke.spec.ts. Mock external APIs via route interception. Add data-testid to all interactive elements. All tests must pass.

tasks.title: Create AGENTS.md master context document
tasks.description: Create AGENTS.md in project root. Under 2000 tokens. Include: project summary (3 sentences), architecture L0-L4 with key file per layer, 20 most important files map, non-negotiable rules, current roadmap status summary, how to run tests (exact commands), common patterns with one example each, known gotchas from any existing logs. Read actual codebase — do not invent.
tasks.test_strategy: python -c "from pathlib import Path; content = Path('AGENTS.md').read_text(); assert len(content) > 500, 'AGENTS.md too short'"
